procedure_title: Insulin Sliding Scale Protocol - Adult Inpatient
clinical_summary: Updated insulin sliding scale protocol incorporating 2025 ADA guidelines. Key changes: adjusted correction factor ranges for patients with eGFR < 30, added continuous glucose monitoring integration, and updated hypoglycemia management thresholds from 70 mg/dL to 54 mg/dL per IHSG consensus.
contraindications: Do not use in: DKA (use DKA protocol PROC-2025-0012), hyperglycemic hyperosmolar state, type 1 diabetes without basal insulin coverage, patients on insulin pump therapy.
evidence_references:
1. ADA Standards of Care in Diabetes (2025)
2. International Hypoglycaemia Study Group. Diabetologia. 2025;68:45-52.
3. Umpierrez GE, et al. J Clin Endocrinol Metab. 2024;109:e1124-e1135.
